name: Welsh Fondue
recipeIngredient: 8 ounces Leeks, trimmed and finely chopped
Cubes of crusty bread, to serve
recipeInstructions:
1. Put butter into a saucepan and melt over low heat.
2. Add leeks, cover pan, and cook gently for 10 minutes until tender. Stir in flour and cook for 1 minute.
3. Add lager and heat until thickened, stirring continuously.
4. Gradually add cheese and continue to cook until melted, stirring frequently. Season with pepper.
5. Pour into a fondue pot and serve with cubes of crusty bread. (Serves 4-6)
